side_effects.description: Clomid killed libido, likely due to estrogen (E2) buildup

protocol_notes: Considering Kisspeptin as alternative to Clomid for testosterone support. Previously on Clomid for 1 year to raise testosterone without resorting to TRT. Tried to switch to Enclomiphene but unable to get prescription or compounded due to FDA approval status. Interested in Kisspeptin because it mimics natural GnRH physiology with short half-life (minutes). Plans to dose 2-3 times per week, test frequently initially, take breaks after months, and retest to verify HPTA sustainability. Planning labs every 3-6 months.
